semantic_description: Counts lowercase vowels in a null-terminated string prefix. The function scans a CharArray-backed string with a while(1) loop, stops when s[i] is 0, increments a scalar accumulator when the current character is one of 97, 101, 105, 111, or 117, returns string_count_vowels_spec(l), and preserves the input memory unchanged. The empty-string case is possible when n is 0, in which case the loop exits immediately and returns 0.
